name: Coding with Lewis
oneLine: Short-form-first developer creator making story-driven web dev and career content across TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram.
bio: Lewis Menelaws is a Canadian developer who co-founded tmrrw labs (enterprise software for health and energy clients) before going full-time as a creator. He posts beginner-friendly modern web dev tutorials, React courses, and career advice to a combined 1.2M+ following (about 700k YouTube, 340k TikTok). His longer YouTube videos lean into narrative case-studies - how Notion scaled, building a $10k trading bot - rather than pure how-to.
style: Vertical short-form on TikTok/Instagram plus 8-15 minute story-driven YouTube essays, often built around a single scaling or product anecdote.
